items.question: What is hallucination in this roadmap?
options: Plausible but false or unsupported generated content
items.answer: Plausible but false or unsupported generated content
items.explanation: Hallucination is a content reliability failure, not infrastructure.

items.question: Best mitigation for factual answers about a provided PDF?
options: Ask Claude to rely on memory from pretraining only
Require answers cite quotes from the pasted document only
Switch to a smaller model for accuracy
items.answer: Require answers cite quotes from the pasted document only
items.explanation: Grounding to supplied text reduces fabricated details.

items.question: Why might Claude refuse a harmless coding request?
options: Alignment false refusal or ambiguous phrasing
Refusals mean the API key expired
items.answer: Alignment false refusal or ambiguous phrasing
items.explanation: Safety tuning can over-trigger; clarify intent or rephrase.

items.question: Which limitation is best addressed by executing code locally instead of trusting mental math?
options: Arithmetic and symbolic precision on long chains
items.answer: Arithmetic and symbolic precision on long chains
items.explanation: LLMs can err on multi-step calculation; a short script or calculator verifies results.
